message:
fix(freeze): fix call_constructor stack layout in Relooper codegen

The Relooper's call_constructor implementation had incorrect stack indexing:
- Constructor was read from stack[sp-1] (should be sp - 2 - argc)
- Args were indexed incorrectly

For `new X(a, b)`, the stack layout is [X, new.target, a, b]:
- Constructor at sp - 2 - argc (before new.target and all args)
- new.target at sp - 1 - argc
- Args at sp - argc, sp - argc + 1, ..., sp - 1

This fix allows `new Proxy()` and other constructor calls to work in
frozen functions that use the Relooper path.
